scripts.dev:electron: wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:5173 && env -u ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE ELECTRON_ENABLE_LOGGING=1 ELECTRON_OZONE_PLATFORM_HINT=x11 XDG_SESSION_TYPE=x11 ./node_modules/electron/dist/electron electron/main.mjs
scripts.test:electron-bridge: vitest run electron/fastApiFallback.test.mjs electron/bridgeResponses.test.mjs electron/fastApiRuntimePolicy.test.mjs electron/fastApiProcessManager.test.mjs electron/fastApiStartupOrchestrator.test.mjs
scripts.test:startup-runtime: vitest run electron/fastApiProcessManager.test.mjs electron/fastApiRuntimePolicy.test.mjs electron/fastApiStartupOrchestrator.test.mjs electron/fastApiFallback.test.mjs electron/bridgeResponses.test.mjs
scripts.test:session-flow: vitest run src/bridge/contract.success.test.ts src/bridge/contract.errors.test.ts src/bridge/contract.session-snapshot.test.ts src/uiErrors.test.ts src/App.startSession.test.tsx src/App.pollingStatus.test.tsx src/App.cancelSession.test.tsx
scripts.test:ui-fast: vitest run src/sourceModel.test.ts src/bridge/contract.success.test.ts src/bridge/contract.errors.test.ts src/bridge/contract.session-snapshot.test.ts src/bridge/transport.test.ts src/uiErrors.test.ts src/presenters/alertFeed.test.ts src/viewModels/playbackState.test.ts src/viewModels/setupState.test.ts src/viewModels/monitoringControls.test.ts
scripts.test:cancel-migration: vitest run electron/fastApiFallback.test.mjs electron/bridgeResponses.test.mjs src/bridge/contract.success.test.ts src/bridge/contract.errors.test.ts src/bridge/contract.session-snapshot.test.ts src/App.cancelSession.test.tsx
scripts.test:startup-milestone: npm run test:startup-runtime && npm run test:frontend-checkpoint
scripts.test:frontend-checkpoint: npm run test:electron-bridge && npm run test:session-flow
scripts.build:web: npm run sync:detectors && tsc -b --incremental false && vite build
scripts.start:electron: env -u ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE ELECTRON_ENABLE_LOGGING=1 ELECTRON_OZONE_PLATFORM_HINT=x11 XDG_SESSION_TYPE=x11 ./node_modules/electron/dist/electron electron/main.mjs
